summary:
Now let me create the HTML pages. I'll build a helper string for the shared header/footer mentally and write each page.
Not relevant to this task. Continuing with the build — I have 6 of the 7 pages plus an extra. Let me write the site_intent.json.
Built **Barnyard & Bone**, a 7-page vintage furniture marketplace.

## Summary

A clustered, chaotic flea-market take on the seed concept. Mustard-and-brick palette, chunky display grotesque slammed against italic old-style serif, paper price-tag overlays and stenciled lot numbers throughout. Every page carries the required text ("Barnyard & Bone", "Next Drop: Thursday, noon Central", "The Picker's Log", "Patina Report") and the sticky cart drawer.

**Interactions wired up in vanilla JS:**
- Live Drop countdown ticking to the next Thursday noon
- 3 / 5 / 8 column density slider on browse
- Multi-select facet pills + Save-this-search
- Watchlist heart toggles on every card
- Patina Report collapsible card with wear / repairs / structural / odor checklist
- Freight quote module that deterministically draws an SVG route, miles, ETA, and dollar estimate from a ZIP
- Sticky cart drawer (collapsed → expanded on click)
- Per-picker Ship / Pickup / White-glove toggle on the cart
- Shoppable photo hotspots on the journal featured dispatch
- Region chip multi-select on the journal

CSS-only product imagery (gradient compositions per category — armchair, cabinet, lamp, rug, mirror, trunk, etc.) keeps the design rich without any downloads.

## Files written

- `index.html` — home with mustard Drop banner, countdown, masonry wall, category color blocks, featured pickers, log teaser, how-it-works
- `browse.html` — sticky facet bar + density slider + inline Drop markers + sidebar of related searches & sold comps
- `lot.html` — gallery + Patina Report + spec table + freight quote w/ SVG route map + seller card + sold comps + more-from-Drop
- `picker.html` — seller storefront with portrait hero, stats, quote, tabs, Drop inventory, dispatches, reviews w/ condition-accuracy
- `cart.html` — items grouped per picker, fulfillment toggle, consolidation prompt, promo/gift, watchlist row, trust strip
- `account.html` — member hero, Drop calendar, 3-column watchlist board, orders timeline w/ progress, followed pickers, settings panels
- `log.html` — The Picker's Log: featured dispatch with shoppable hotspots, region chips, dispatch grid, submit-a-tip form
- `styles.css` — shared stylesheet (~53 KB) with full design system
- `app.js` — countdown, density, facets, patina, freight quote, cart drawer, hotspots
- `site_intent.json` — implemented concept manifest
